response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with nearly two decades of software experience, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. The position requires 8 years of C++ experience; his C++ exposure is limited to roughly seven months at National Instruments plus a thesis project, with his systems-level work primarily in DLang. He has some relevant high-throughput distributed systems experience (Sociomantic) and mentoring/teaching activity, but no sustained cloud compute platform work at scale and no formal technical-leadership role owning cross-team strategy, priorities, and deliverables.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Broad full-stack and infrastructure versatility (Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, AWS CDK)
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and coding dojos
concerns: Far short of the required 8 years of C++ experience (systems work is mostly DLang)
No formal technical-lead role managing cross-team alignment, priorities, and deadlines
Limited production cloud architecture and compute-platform experience at hyperscale

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal technical leadership experience
